allies.rationale_text: Simplification gives Occam's Razor its practical expression by stripping away ornamental complexity so the explanation can be judged on what the evidence actually supports.
Cognitive-load-theory complements Occam's Razor because pruning unnecessary complexity reduces the mental burden that makes weak explanations feel harder to test.
allies.source_quote: the best explanation is often the one with the least unnecessary complexity

allies.rationale_text: Prioritization helps Occam's Razor focus attention on the assumptions that matter instead of treating every possible complication as equally important.
allies.source_quote: select the explanation that makes the fewest assumptions

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias corrupts Occam's Razor when the thinker chooses the simpler story because it feels congenial, not because it best fits the evidence.
antagonists.source_quote: the simplest explanation is not always the correct one if reality is genuinely complex

antagonists.rationale_text: Representativeness-heuristic corrupts Occam's Razor by substituting story-based parsimony for evidence-based parsimony — the most familiar and vivid explanation feels like the simplest one even when it isn't the most grounded.
antagonists.source_quote: occams-razor vs representativeness-heuristic: occams-razor conflicts with representativeness-heuristic (representativeness heuristic) when the tension between story simplicity and causal accuracy causes the easiest explanation to substitute for the most evidentially grounded one.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Occam's-razor conflicts with representativeness-heuristic when story simplicity and causal accuracy pull apart — the representativeness heuristic makes the most familiar pattern feel like the most parsimonious explanation, displacing the evidence-based test the razor requires.
structured_tensions.source_quote: occams-razor vs representativeness-heuristic: occams-razor conflicts with representativeness-heuristic (representativeness heuristic) when the tension between story simplicity and causal accuracy causes the easiest explanation to substitute for the most evidentially grounded one.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on simplification, assumption pruning, and conflicts with evidence-resistant neat stories and representativeness-driven story parsimony.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor relation widening beyond the clean simplification and anti-confirmation neighborhood.
